<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>TP DCL PostgreSQL — Salim Amir</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;400;500;700&family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{--bg:#0a0f1a;--surface:#111827;--surface2:#1a2335;--border:#1e3a5f;--accent:#0ea5e9;--accent2:#22d3ee;--green:#10b981;--yellow:#f59e0b;--red:#ef4444;--orange:#f97316;--text:#e2e8f0;--muted:#64748b;--code-bg:#060d1a}
  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
  body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;line-height:1.7;min-height:100vh}
  .hero{position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding:80px 40px 60px;text-align:center;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 20% 50%,rgba(14,165,233,0.12) 0%,transparent 60%),radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 80% 50%,rgba(34,211,238,0.08) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none}
  .hero-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(14,165,233,0.05) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(14,165,233,0.05) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:48px 48px}
  .badge-row{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:24px;position:relative}
  .badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 13px;border-radius:999px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;border:1px solid;letter-spacing:.03em}
  .b-blue{background:rgba(14,165,233,0.12);border-color:rgba(14,165,233,0.4);color:#7dd3fc}
  .b-cyan{background:rgba(34,211,238,0.10);border-color:rgba(34,211,238,0.35);color:#67e8f9}
  .b-green{background:rgba(16,185,129,0.10);border-color:rgba(16,185,129,0.35);color:#6ee7b7}
  .b-orange{background:rgba(249,115,22,0.10);border-color:rgba(249,115,22,0.35);color:#fdba74}
  .b-yellow{background:rgba(245,158,11,0.10);border-color:rgba(245,158,11,0.35);color:#fcd34d}
  .hero h1{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,5vw,3rem);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.03em;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:14px;position:relative;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e2e8f0 0%,#7dd3fc 40%,#67e8f9 70%,#6ee7b7 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
  .hero-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:1rem;max-width:560px;margin:0 auto 28px;position:relative}
  .meta-row{display:flex;gap:18px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;position:relative}
  .meta-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace}
  .meta-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);flex-shrink:0}
  .container{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto;padding:56px 24px 80px}
  .section-title{font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--text);margin:56px 0 22px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding-bottom:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .s-num{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:7px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}
  .theory-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:12px;margin-bottom:28px}
  .theory-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:18px;transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s}
  .theory-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px)}
  .theory-icon{font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:10px}
  .theory-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2);margin-bottom:6px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:.04em}
  .theory-desc{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5}
  .sql-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:16px 0;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border)}
  .sql-table th{background:var(--surface2);padding:10px 14px;text-align:left;color:var(--muted);font-size:10.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .sql-table td{padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(30,58,95,0.5);font-size:13px}
  .sql-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
  .sql-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(14,165,233,0.04)}
  .sql-table td:first-child{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2)}
  .sql-table td:nth-child(2){color:var(--muted);font-size:12px}
  .sql-table td:last-child{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:#fdba74}
  .etape{margin:32px 0 0;animation:fadeUp .4s ease both}
  @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
  .etape-title{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
  .etape-num{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2);white-space:nowrap}
  .etape-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:13.5px;margin-bottom:14px}
  .code-block{background:var(--code-bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;margin:8px 0 14px}
  .code-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:9px 14px;background:var(--surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .code-lang{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase}
  .code-dots{display:flex;gap:5px}
  .dot-r{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:#ef4444}
  .dot-y{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:#f59e0b}
  .dot-g{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:#22c55e}
  pre{margin:0;padding:18px 20px;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:var(--border) transparent}
  code{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.9;color:#e2e8f0;white-space:pre}
  .kw{color:#38bdf8;font-weight:600}.kw2{color:#818cf8;font-weight:600}.str{color:#34d399}.cmd{color:#c084fc}.cmt{color:#475569;font-style:italic}.val{color:#fbbf24}.flag{color:#7dd3fc}.tbl{color:#fb923c}
  .tip{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;padding:12px 16px;border-radius:9px;font-size:13.5px;margin:10px 0}
  .tip-warn{background:rgba(245,158,11,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.25)}
  .tip-info{background:rgba(14,165,233,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,0.25)}
  .perm-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:14px 0;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border)}
  .perm-table th{background:var(--surface2);padding:9px 14px;text-align:left;color:var(--muted);font-size:10.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .perm-table td{padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(30,58,95,0.4);font-size:13px}
  .perm-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
  .perm-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(14,165,233,0.04)}
  .perm-table td:first-child{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--accent2);font-weight:600}
  .ok-cell{color:#34d399;font-weight:700;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px}
  .err-cell{color:#f87171;font-weight:700;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px}
  .user-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:14px;margin:16px 0}
  .user-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .2s}
  .user-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)}
  .user-head{padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .user-avatar{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.1rem;flex-shrink:0}
  .ua-blue{background:rgba(14,165,233,0.2);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,0.35)}
  .ua-green{background:rgba(16,185,129,0.2);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.35)}
  .ua-orange{background:rgba(249,115,22,0.2);border:1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.35)}
  .user-name{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:var(--text)}
  .user-role{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
  .user-body{padding:14px 18px}
  .perm-tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;margin:3px 3px 3px 0}
  .pt-green{background:rgba(16,185,129,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.3);color:#6ee7b7}
  .pt-blue{background:rgba(14,165,233,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,0.3);color:#7dd3fc}
  .pt-orange{background:rgba(249,115,22,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.3);color:#fdba74}
  .pt-red{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);color:#fca5a5}
  /* SCREENSHOT REAL */
  .screenshot-block{margin:16px 0 24px;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface)}
  .screenshot-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:10px 16px;background:var(--surface2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .cap-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.35);color:#6ee7b7;border-radius:5px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase}
  .cap-name{font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)}
  .screenshot-block img{width:100%;display:block}
  .retenir-box{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,0.3);border-radius:14px;padding:24px;margin-top:56px}
  .retenir-title{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2);margin-bottom:18px}
  .retenir-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:12px}
  .retenir-item{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px}
  .retenir-item-title{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:6px}
  .retenir-item-desc{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.4}
  .footer{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:36px 24px;text-align:center}
  .footer-inner{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto}
  .result-row{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:28px}
  .result-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.25);border-radius:7px;padding:7px 14px;font-size:12.5px;color:#6ee7b7;font-weight:500}
  .author-card{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px 22px}
  .avatar{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:.95rem;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}
  .author-name{font-weight:700;font-size:14px}
  .author-sub{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;margin-top:2px}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="badge-row">
    <span class="badge b-blue">🎓 Collège Boréal</span>
    <span class="badge b-cyan">🐘 PostgreSQL 16</span>
    <span class="badge b-green">🔑 DCL</span>
    <span class="badge b-orange">🏟️ Centres Sportifs</span>
    <span class="badge b-yellow">📅 2026</span>
  </div>
  <h1>TP DCL — Gestion des utilisateurs<br>et permissions PostgreSQL</h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">Contrôle des droits d'accès sur la base de données du système de gestion de centres sportifs — GRANT, REVOKE, CREATE USER.</p>
  <div class="meta-row">
    <div class="meta-item"><span class="meta-dot"></span>Salim Amir</div>
    <div class="meta-item"><span class="meta-dot"></span>#300150293</div>
    <div class="meta-item"><span class="meta-dot"></span>INF1099 · Collège Boréal</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="container">

  <div class="section-title"><span class="s-num">📖</span>Théorie — DCL et ACL</div>
  <div class="theory-grid">
    <div class="theory-card"><div class="theory-icon">🔑</div><div class="theory-title">DCL — Data Control Language</div><div class="theory-desc">Contrôle <strong>qui peut faire quoi</strong> dans la base de données. Opère sur les tables, schémas et séquences.</div></div>
    <div class="theory-card"><div class="theory-icon">🛡️</div><div class="theory-title">ACL — Access Control List</div><div class="theory-desc">Contrôle l'accès aux <strong>ressources système</strong> — fichiers, répertoires, services réseau.</div></div>
    <div class="theory-card"><div class="theory-icon">📊</div><div class="theory-title">Niveaux PostgreSQL</div><div class="theory-desc"><strong>Base</strong> → connexion · <strong>Schéma</strong> → accès objets · <strong>Table</strong> → droits CRUD</div></div>
  </div>

  <table class="sql-table">
    <thead><tr><th>Catégorie</th><th>But</th><th>Exemples</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td>DDL</td><td>Définir/modifier la structure</td><td>CREATE TABLE, ALTER TABLE, DROP TABLE</td></tr>
      <tr><td>DML</td><td>Manipuler les données</td><td>INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE</td></tr>
      <tr><td>DQL</td><td>Interroger / lire les données</td><td>SELECT</td></tr>
      <tr><td>DCL</td><td>Contrôler les droits</td><td>GRANT, REVOKE, CREATE USER</td></tr>
      <tr><td>TCL</td><td>Gérer les transactions</td><td>COMMIT, ROLLBACK</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>

  <div class="section-title"><span class="s-num">🎯</span>Objectifs du TP</div>
  <div class="theory-grid">
    <div class="theory-card"><div class="theory-icon">👤</div><div class="theory-title">Créer des utilisateurs</div><div class="theory-desc">Définir des rôles avec des mots de passe sécurisés dans PostgreSQL.</div></div>
    <div class="theory-card"><div class="theory-icon">🔓</div><div class="theory-title">Gérer les droits</div><div class="theory-desc">Attribuer des permissions de lecture/écriture avec GRANT.</div></div>
    <div class="theory-card"><div class="theory-icon">🧪</div><div class="theory-title">Tester les permissions</div><div class="theory-desc">Vérifier que les restrictions fonctionnent correctement.</div></div>
    <div class="theory-card"><div class="theory-icon">🔒</div><div class="theory-title">Retirer les droits</div><div class="theory-desc">Utiliser REVOKE pour supprimer les accès accordés.</div></div>
  </div>

  <!-- PARTIE 1 -->
  <div class="section-title"><span class="s-num">1</span>Préparation — Connexion et création de la base</div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 1</span>Entrer dans le conteneur et se connecter</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">CMD / PowerShell</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmd">podman container exec</span> <span class="flag">--interactive --tty</span> postgres bash
<span class="cmd">psql</span> <span class="flag">-U</span> postgres</code></pre>
    </div>

    <div class="etape-title" style="margin-top:16px;"><span class="etape-num">Étape 2</span>Créer la base, le schéma et la table</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">SQL — psql</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="kw">CREATE DATABASE</span> cours;
<span class="kw">\c</span> cours
<span class="kw">CREATE SCHEMA</span> tp_dcl;
<span class="kw">CREATE TABLE</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span> (
    id      <span class="kw2">SERIAL PRIMARY KEY</span>,
    client  <span class="kw2">TEXT</span>,
    terrain <span class="kw2">TEXT</span>,
    montant <span class="kw2">NUMERIC</span>
);</code></pre>
    </div>

    <div class="screenshot-block">
      <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Capture 1</span><span class="cap-name">Création base cours + schéma tp_dcl + table reservation</span></div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Capture 1">
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PARTIE 2 -->
  <div class="section-title"><span class="s-num">2</span>Créer les utilisateurs</div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 3</span>Créer 3 utilisateurs avec des rôles différents</div>

    <div class="user-grid">
      <div class="user-card">
        <div class="user-head"><div class="user-avatar ua-blue">👤</div><div><div class="user-name">client_sport</div><div class="user-role">Lecture seule</div></div></div>
        <div class="user-body"><span class="perm-tag pt-green">SELECT</span><span class="perm-tag pt-red">❌ INSERT</span><span class="perm-tag pt-red">❌ UPDATE</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="user-card">
        <div class="user-head"><div class="user-avatar ua-orange">🏋️</div><div><div class="user-name">employe_sport</div><div class="user-role">Lecture + Écriture</div></div></div>
        <div class="user-body"><span class="perm-tag pt-green">SELECT</span><span class="perm-tag pt-blue">INSERT</span><span class="perm-tag pt-orange">UPDATE</span><span class="perm-tag pt-red">❌ DELETE</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="user-card">
        <div class="user-head"><div class="user-avatar ua-green">👑</div><div><div class="user-name">gestionnaire</div><div class="user-role">Accès complet</div></div></div>
        <div class="user-body"><span class="perm-tag pt-green">SELECT</span><span class="perm-tag pt-blue">INSERT</span><span class="perm-tag pt-orange">UPDATE</span><span class="perm-tag pt-red">DELETE</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">SQL — CREATE USER</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmt">-- Client : lecture seule</span>
<span class="kw">CREATE USER</span> client_sport <span class="kw">WITH PASSWORD</span> <span class="str">'client123'</span>;

<span class="cmt">-- Employé : lecture + écriture</span>
<span class="kw">CREATE USER</span> employe_sport <span class="kw">WITH PASSWORD</span> <span class="str">'employe123'</span>;

<span class="cmt">-- Gestionnaire : accès complet</span>
<span class="kw">CREATE USER</span> gestionnaire <span class="kw">WITH PASSWORD</span> <span class="str">'gest123'</span>;</code></pre>
    </div>

    <div class="tip tip-info">
      <span>ℹ️</span>
      <span>Sur la capture, on voit <strong>ERROR: role "employe_sport" already exists</strong> — c'est normal, l'utilisateur avait déjà été créé lors d'un premier essai. Les 3 rôles existent bien.</span>
    </div>

    <div class="screenshot-block">
      <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Capture 2</span><span class="cap-name">Création des 3 utilisateurs — CREATE ROLE × 3</span></div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Capture 2">
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PARTIE 3 -->
  <div class="section-title"><span class="s-num">3</span>Donner des droits — GRANT</div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 4</span>Accorder les permissions par niveau</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">SQL — GRANT</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmt">-- 1. Connexion à la base</span>
<span class="kw">GRANT CONNECT ON DATABASE</span> cours <span class="kw">TO</span> client_sport, employe_sport, gestionnaire;

<span class="cmt">-- 2. Accès au schéma</span>
<span class="kw">GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA</span> tp_dcl <span class="kw">TO</span> client_sport, employe_sport, gestionnaire;

<span class="cmt">-- 3. Client : lecture seule</span>
<span class="kw">GRANT SELECT ON</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span> <span class="kw">TO</span> client_sport;

<span class="cmt">-- 4. Employé : lecture + insertion + modification</span>
<span class="kw">GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE ON</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span> <span class="kw">TO</span> employe_sport;

<span class="cmt">-- 5. Gestionnaire : accès complet</span>
<span class="kw">GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE ON</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span> <span class="kw">TO</span> gestionnaire;

<span class="cmt">-- 6. Droits sur la séquence</span>
<span class="kw">GRANT USAGE, SELECT, UPDATE ON SEQUENCE</span> tp_dcl.reservation_id_seq <span class="kw">TO</span> employe_sport, gestionnaire;</code></pre>
    </div>

    <div class="screenshot-block">
      <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Capture 3</span><span class="cap-name">Attribution des permissions — GRANT × 5</span></div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Capture 3">
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PARTIE 4 -->
  <div class="section-title"><span class="s-num">4</span>Tester les permissions</div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 5</span>Insérer des données et tester client_sport</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">SQL — Test permissions</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="cmt">-- Insérer des données de test (en tant que gestionnaire)</span>
<span class="kw">INSERT INTO</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span>(client, terrain, montant)
<span class="kw">VALUES</span> (<span class="str">'Salim'</span>, <span class="str">'Foot'</span>, <span class="val">40</span>);

<span class="cmt">-- Tester client_sport : SELECT ✅</span>
<span class="kw">\c</span> cours client_sport
<span class="kw">SELECT</span> * <span class="kw">FROM</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span>;

<span class="cmt">-- Tester client_sport : INSERT ❌</span>
<span class="kw">INSERT INTO</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span>(client, terrain, montant)
<span class="kw">VALUES</span> (<span class="str">'Hack'</span>, <span class="str">'Terrain X'</span>, <span class="val">0</span>);</code></pre>
    </div>

    <table class="perm-table">
      <thead><tr><th>Utilisateur</th><th>SELECT</th><th>INSERT</th><th>UPDATE</th><th>DELETE</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td>client_sport</td><td class="ok-cell">✅ OK</td><td class="err-cell">❌ ERREUR</td><td class="err-cell">❌ ERREUR</td><td class="err-cell">❌ ERREUR</td></tr>
        <tr><td>employe_sport</td><td class="ok-cell">✅ OK</td><td class="ok-cell">✅ OK</td><td class="ok-cell">✅ OK</td><td class="err-cell">❌ ERREUR</td></tr>
        <tr><td>gestionnaire</td><td class="ok-cell">✅ OK</td><td class="ok-cell">✅ OK</td><td class="ok-cell">✅ OK</td><td class="ok-cell">✅ OK</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>

    <div class="screenshot-block">
      <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Capture 4</span><span class="cap-name">Test client_sport — SELECT ✅ / INSERT ❌ permission denied</span></div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Capture 4">
    </div>

    <div class="etape-title" style="margin-top:20px;"><span class="etape-num">Étape 6</span>Tester avec employe_sport</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">SQL — Test employe_sport</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="kw">\c</span> cours employe_sport

<span class="cmt">-- ✅ INSERT réussit</span>
<span class="kw">INSERT INTO</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span>(client, terrain, montant)
<span class="kw">VALUES</span> (<span class="str">'Alex'</span>, <span class="str">'Tennis'</span>, <span class="val">50</span>);

<span class="cmt">-- ✅ UPDATE réussit</span>
<span class="kw">UPDATE</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span>
<span class="kw">SET</span> montant = <span class="val">100</span>
<span class="kw">WHERE</span> client = <span class="str">'Alex'</span>;</code></pre>
    </div>

    <div class="screenshot-block">
      <div class="screenshot-top"><span class="cap-badge">✅ Capture 5</span><span class="cap-name">Test employe_sport — INSERT ✅ / UPDATE ✅</span></div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Capture 5">
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PARTIE 5 -->
  <div class="section-title"><span class="s-num">5</span>Retirer des droits — REVOKE</div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 7</span>Révoquer les permissions de client_sport</div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">SQL — REVOKE</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="kw">\c</span> cours postgres

<span class="cmt">-- Retirer le droit de lecture au client</span>
<span class="kw">REVOKE SELECT ON</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span> <span class="kw">FROM</span> client_sport;

<span class="cmt">-- Vérifier — doit échouer maintenant</span>
<span class="kw">\c</span> - client_sport
<span class="kw">SELECT</span> * <span class="kw">FROM</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span>;  <span class="cmt">-- ❌ ERREUR maintenant</span></code></pre>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px dashed var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:24px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;margin:14px 0;">
      🖼️ <strong style="color:#6ee7b7;">Capture 6</strong> — REVOKE · à insérer ici · SELECT doit retourner <span style="color:#f87171;">ERROR: permission denied</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PARTIE 6 -->
  <div class="section-title"><span class="s-num">6</span>Supprimer les utilisateurs — DROP USER</div>

  <div class="etape">
    <div class="etape-title"><span class="etape-num">Étape 8</span>Révoquer tous les droits puis supprimer</div>
    <div class="tip tip-warn"><span>⚠️</span><span>PostgreSQL ne permet pas de supprimer un utilisateur s'il possède encore des droits. Il faut d'abord révoquer tous ses accès.</span></div>
    <div class="code-block">
      <div class="code-header"><div class="code-dots"><div class="dot-r"></div><div class="dot-y"></div><div class="dot-g"></div></div><span class="code-lang">SQL — DROP USER</span></div>
      <pre><code><span class="kw">\c</span> cours postgres

<span class="cmt">-- Révoquer tous les droits restants</span>
<span class="kw">REVOKE ALL ON</span> tp_dcl.<span class="tbl">reservation</span> <span class="kw">FROM</span> employe_sport, gestionnaire;
<span class="kw">REVOKE ALL ON SEQUENCE</span> tp_dcl.reservation_id_seq <span class="kw">FROM</span> employe_sport, gestionnaire;
<span class="kw">REVOKE USAGE ON SCHEMA</span> tp_dcl <span class="kw">FROM</span> client_sport, employe_sport, gestionnaire;
<span class="kw">REVOKE CONNECT ON DATABASE</span> cours <span class="kw">FROM</span> client_sport, employe_sport, gestionnaire;

<span class="cmt">-- Supprimer les 3 utilisateurs</span>
<span class="kw">DROP USER</span> client_sport;
<span class="kw">DROP USER</span> employe_sport;
<span class="kw">DROP USER</span> gestionnaire;</code></pre>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px dashed var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:24px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;margin:14px 0;">
      🖼️ <strong style="color:#6ee7b7;">Capture 7</strong> — DROP USER × 3 · à insérer ici · on doit voir <span style="color:#34d399;">DROP ROLE</span> × 3
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- À RETENIR -->
  <div class="retenir-box">
    <div class="retenir-title">🧠 À retenir</div>
    <div class="retenir-grid">
      <div class="retenir-item"><div class="retenir-item-title">GRANT</div><div class="retenir-item-desc">Donne des permissions à un utilisateur sur une ressource.</div></div>
      <div class="retenir-item"><div class="retenir-item-title">REVOKE</div><div class="retenir-item-desc">Retire des permissions accordées précédemment.</div></div>
      <div class="retenir-item"><div class="retenir-item-title">CREATE USER</div><div class="retenir-item-desc">Crée un rôle avec mot de passe dans PostgreSQL.</div></div>
      <div class="retenir-item"><div class="retenir-item-title">DROP USER</div><div class="retenir-item-desc">Supprime un utilisateur — droits doivent être révoqués d'abord.</div></div>
      <div class="retenir-item"><div class="retenir-item-title">3 Niveaux</div><div class="retenir-item-desc">Base → Schéma → Table. Les droits se gèrent à chaque niveau.</div></div>
      <div class="retenir-item"><div class="retenir-item-title">DCL vs ACL</div><div class="retenir-item-desc">DCL = droits en base de données. ACL = droits système/fichiers.</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="footer">
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.13em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:18px;">🎉 Résultats atteints</div>
    <div class="result-row">
      <div class="result-item">✅ 3 utilisateurs créés</div>
      <div class="result-item">✅ Permissions accordées</div>
      <div class="result-item">✅ Restrictions testées</div>
      <div class="result-item">✅ REVOKE appliqué</div>
      <div class="result-item">✅ DROP USER exécuté</div>
      <div class="result-item">✅ 5 captures intégrées</div>
    </div>
    <div class="author-card">
      <div class="avatar">SA</div>
      <div>
        <div class="author-name">Salim Amir</div>
        <div class="author-sub">#300150293 · INF1099 · Collège Boréal · 2026</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</body>
</html>
